speaker: Roger
en: Good morning.

speaker: Roger
en: This is the Customer Service Department of Kingswell Washing Machine.

speaker: Roger
en: Roger speaking, how may I help you?

speaker: Woman
en: Good morning.

speaker: Woman
en: I'm calling about the washing machine I bought from the mall several months ago.

speaker: Woman
en: There's something wrong with it at the moment, so what do I have to do?

speaker: Roger
en: OK, first I need to get a few details about this.

speaker: Roger
en: Could you give me your name, please?

speaker: Woman
en: Yes, it's Judie Smith.

speaker: Roger
en: OK.

speaker: Roger
en: I need one more thing.

speaker: Roger
en: There's a reference number.

speaker: Roger
en: It should be in the top right-hand corner of the warranty card we gave you.

speaker: Woman
en: Let me have a look … Oh, here it is.

speaker: Woman
en: It's CWX576884.

speaker: Roger
en: Thanks.

speaker: Roger
en: Well, I need to make sure if your washing machine is still within the warranty period, so when did you buy it?

speaker: Woman
en: Oh, sure.

speaker: Woman
en: I remember I bought it last summer, so … it was about 9 months ago.

speaker: Woman
en: And the card here says this washing machine has a 2-year warranty, so it's definitely within the period.

speaker: Roger
en: Of course it is, Madam.

speaker: Roger
en: All right, then I need your address?

speaker: Woman
en: My old address or my current one?

speaker: Roger
en: Your current one, as we will send in someone to fix the washing machine for you.

speaker: Woman
en: It's 120 Middle Street, Oxford.

speaker: Roger
en: And the postcode?

speaker: Woman
en: It's GO19 4KE.

speaker: Roger
en: Now I need to know the exact problem of the washing machine.

speaker: Roger
en: Could you describe it in detail?

speaker: Woman
en: Actually the washing machine did work very well until last weekend.

speaker: Woman
en: I put some clothes into it, and it worked normally at first, then I just got down to doing some gardening.

speaker: Woman
en: But after about 30 minutes when I came back to the house, I found it was leaking!

speaker: Woman
en: The water had soaked the entire floor.

speaker: Roger
en: I'm sorry to hear that, Madam.

speaker: Roger
en: So did you do anything to make the leaking stop?

speaker: Woman
en: At that moment, the washing machine was totally out of control, and the alarm on it also started to sound.

speaker: Woman
en: I thought there was not much point in pressing any button on the machine, so I just switched off the machine straight away.

speaker: Woman
en: Then it stopped leaking at once, thank goodness!

speaker: Roger
en: Well, I think that was the only thing you could do.

speaker: Woman
en: Oh then, I found my floor was nearly a disaster.

speaker: Woman
en: As it is made of wood rather than marble, it could not be soaked in water for a long time, so what I did in the next 2 hours was wiping up the water on the floor!

speaker: Roger
en: Right.

speaker: Woman
en: Later I tried the washing machine once more, but the problem still existed.

speaker: Roger
en: Well, I've taken down all the related information.

speaker: Roger
en: Later we'll send a client engineer to your house to fix it.

speaker: Woman
en: OK.

speaker: Woman
en: Could you arrange the repair work as soon as possible, as I'm too busy at work to do the laundry by hand?

speaker: Woman
en: How about this Saturday?

speaker: Roger
en: Umm … I have to check the schedule of the repairman … Oh sorry, Madam, Saturday has been occupied.

speaker: Roger
en: The earliest day we can arrange for you is next Tuesday.

speaker: Roger
en: Is that OK with you?

speaker: Woman
en: Fine, I can take a leave from work that day.

speaker: Woman
en: Anyway, thanks.

speaker: Woman
en: Oh, my house is easy to find.

speaker: Woman
en: It's near the Central Market, just across from the Post Office.

speaker: Roger
en: All right.

speaker: Roger
en: And the last thing, could you tell me your phone number, please?

speaker: Woman
en: Sure.

speaker: Roger
en: OK.

speaker: Roger
en: I've got it.

speaker: Roger
en: The repairman will contact you before he comes.

speaker: Woman
en: OK.

speaker: Woman
en: Thank you very much.

speaker: Roger
en: You're welcome.

speaker: Roger
en: Bye!

speaker: Woman
en: Bye!
